rationale: This candidate fixes the KeyError from the previous generation by removing all info-dependent fuel efficiency and touchdown checks. Fuel efficiency is replaced with a penalty on the action magnitude (using action directly, which is always available). Touchdown bonus is simplified to use only obs (leg contacts and position/velocity thresholds). The terminal component uses done and obs for crash/out-of-bounds detection. All components use safe expressions with obs, action, next_obs, done, np, math, abs, min, max, float, int, bool.

components.description: Penalty proportional to horizontal distance from x=0
Penalty for linear and angular velocity magnitude
Penalty for deviation from upright angle
Small penalty for any engine firing (action != 0)

components.expression: 10.0 * float(obs[6] == 1.0 and obs[7] == 1.0 and abs(obs[0]) < 0.1 and abs(obs[2]) < 0.1 and abs(obs[3]) < 0.1 and abs(obs[4]) < 0.1)
components.description: Bonus when both legs contact, near pad, low velocity, upright

components.expression: -100.0 * float(done and not (obs[6] == 1.0 and obs[7] == 1.0 and abs(obs[0]) < 0.1 and abs(obs[2]) < 0.1 and abs(obs[3]) < 0.1 and abs(obs[4]) < 0.1))
components.description: Large penalty for termination without successful landing
